name: Altos de Marbella Residences
description: A small collection of elevated homes with open terraces, sea views and a quieter coastal setting.
seoDescription: Explore Altos de Marbella Residences, with sea-facing homes in Marbella East from EUR 1,250,000.
twitterDescription: Marbella East elevated coastline new development preview from EUR 1,250,000.

contact.whatsappMessage: Hello Nueva Living, I would like to speak with an advisor about Altos de Marbella Residences.

card.label: Marbella East
card.description: A small collection of elevated homes with open terraces, sea views and a quieter coastal setting.

discovery.advisoryBadge: Chosen for sea views and privacy

hero.alt: Elevated sea-facing terrace with private pool and Mediterranean outlook

architecture.alt: Open-plan residence connecting lounge, terrace and private pool
architecture.caption: Indoor-outdoor continuity

privateViewing.alt: Private pool terrace at sunset with coastal views

quickFacts: Current price list confirmed before viewing

copy: Altos de Marbella is for buyers who want more space, privacy and open views close to the Mediterranean.
It sits above the busier beachfront, with large terraces and wide windows that make the most of the light and sea views.

why.copy: This project suits buyers who want a well-designed home with privacy, generous outdoor space and easy access to Marbella East.
points: Buyers who want privacy and good design without being far from Marbella's services.
The focus is on large terraces, natural light and elevation rather than a busy beachfront setting.
Marbella East keeps the beach close while offering a calmer residential setting.
Homes, views and payment plans can change quickly, so it is worth checking the latest details before you shortlist.

copy: The architecture uses clean horizontal lines, shaded outdoor areas and wide windows that connect the rooms to the terraces.
The design is calm rather than showy, with a focus on proportion, shade, views and natural materials.
highlights: Large-format openings designed around light and sea orientation.
Generous terraces with a natural connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
Warm natural textures balanced by crisp architectural volumes.
Private pool and garden options across selected residences.

residences.copy: Every home is planned around outdoor space and privacy. Ask for the latest developer pack to confirm sizes, layouts and availability.

items.name: Penthouses
features: Upper-level privacy and open coastal outlooks.
Large terraces arranged for dining and lounging.
Selected units with private pool or plunge-pool options.

items.name: Villas
features: Family-scale interior planning with entertainment space.
Designed for extended stays and permanent use.

items.name: Garden Residences
features: Direct access to generous private outdoor space.
Quiet garden views and easy terrace access.

privateViewing.headlineHtml: Take a closer look at the project
privateViewing.copy: See the setting, architecture and main spaces before asking for the full project pack.
insights: Wide windows, connected terraces and warm, simple materials.
Garden homes, penthouses and villas with different amounts of outdoor space.
Buyers who want privacy, coastal access and a well-designed everyday home.
Ask for the project file to check layouts, availability and viewing options.

lifestyle.headlineHtml: A quieter way to live near Marbella
lifestyle.copy: Altos de Marbella keeps the coast close without putting you in the middle of the busiest areas. Marbella town, beach clubs, golf and everyday services are all a short drive away.
panels: The terraces are made for morning light, evening meals and long coastal views.
The hillside setting feels removed from the busiest part of the coast while staying well connected.
Simple planning and warm materials work well for long stays, family use or lock-up-and-leave ownership.

location.copy: Marbella East is popular for its established neighbourhoods and easy beach access. The elevated setting adds privacy and better views without making daily life difficult.

investment.copy: If investment matters to you, look at the timing, developer, exact home and limited supply of elevated sea-view projects. Returns are never guaranteed.
cards: Buying earlier may give you more choice and a clearer payment plan, but the completion risk and developer still need checking.
Current documents, availability and reservation terms are more useful than a short public listing.
Elevation, outdoor space, quality and the exact location can help a home hold its appeal over time.
The homes may work for both personal use and occasional rental, depending on local rules and market conditions.

trustDossier.copy: Before a viewing or reservation, make sure you understand the developer, legal steps, available documents and expected completion.
cards: We check the developer, build status and specification against the latest project documents.
You should understand the reservation, payment plan and legal checks before choosing a home.
We verify expected completion, warranties and handover details rather than relying on marketing claims.
Nueva Living puts the key facts side by side so you can make a clear decision.

items: Review the brochure, floorplans, latest availability and prices before shortlisting.
Look at home types, orientation, payment plans and how well each one fits.
Arrange an in-person or guided online viewing once the right homes are clear.
Confirm the reservation terms, legal support and latest developer documents.

projectFile.copy: We share project documents directly so you receive the latest prices, availability and technical details.
documents: Latest released units and guide pricing
Site layout, orientation and shared amenities

availability.copy: Availability changes often. Ask for the latest homes, prices, floorplans and payment plan before booking a viewing or reserving.

enquiry.copy: Ask for the latest availability, floorplans or a private viewing. We will send the right project information and help with the next step.
enquiry.message: I would like to receive the latest information for Altos de Marbella Residences, including current availability, prices, floorplans and viewing options.
enquiry.note: Your enquiry will be linked to Altos de Marbella Residences.
enquiry.sentMessage: Thank you. We have received your Altos de Marbella enquiry and will be in touch.
